chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-201 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto, A.A.G Sindh. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G for the State. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* None present for the Petitioner and same was the position on last date of hearing i.e. 11.08.2025. As per contentions of para No.2 & 3 of the memo of Petition, it appears that there is criminal dispute in between parties; therefore, the petitioner is set at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of her grievance if she desires. In view of the above terms, the instant Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali.
